positive: A whimsical, cozy illustration of an anthropomorphic sloth wearing a tiny reading cap, curled up in a hammock amongst giant glowing mushrooms. Soft pastel color palette, storybook illustration style, high level of detail, Pixar quality rendering, inviting and gentle mood.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, scary, dark, aggressive, hyper-realistic
